data.title: SunPerp's public beta has surpassed 7,000 users in 10 days, with a cumulative transaction volume of 19.5 million USDT.
data.description: According to official social media, SunPerp, a decentralized perpetual contract exchange within the TRON ecosystem, has surpassed 7,000 users and achieved an average daily trading volume of 1.95 million USDT on its 10th day of public beta. Compared to the first week of public beta, total trading volume increased by 6,200%, with daily trading volume increasing by 153.4%. SunPerp will reportedly use SUN as its platform token and plans to use platform revenue for SUN buybacks and burns. Since the public beta launch, on-chain SUN transfers have increased significantly.

data.description: According to the official website, Hyperliquid has just launched the HYPE/USDH spot trading pair, having previously launched USDH/USDC.

data.title: Bitcoin Tipped To Peak In 2026 – Here’s Why
data.description:
Following a rather turbulent trading week, Bitcoin prices now sit below $110,000, representing a 12% decline from its all-time high at $124,457. Amid this situation, popular analyst Ted Pillows has shared an audacious market prediction that would douse fears of an impending cycle top. Related Reading: Bitcoin Bull Run Is Over? These Signals Show Where The Market Is At Institutional Demand To Extend Bitcoin Market Cycle To 2026 A typical crypto market cycle has always peaked in Q4 of the fourth year. This timing usually matches the post-halving hype and a strong wave of retail and institutional market demand
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/news/bitcoin/bitcoin-tipped-to-peak-in-2026-heres-why/

data.title: Ethereum Treasury Companies Face Decline in mNAV Amid Price Drop
data.description:
According to PANews, data from Strategicethreserve indicates that the mNAV metrics of three Ethereum treasury companies—SharpLink, The Ether Machine, and ETHZilla—have fallen below 1 due to declining ETH prices. The mNAV values have reached 0.99, 0.07, and 0.88, respectively. Currently, these companies hold 838,730, 495,360, and 102,240 ETH.

The market value to net asset value ratio, mNAV, is a crucial indicator for assessing the valuation of treasury companies. When mNAV exceeds 1, companies can issue additional financing at a premium and use the proceeds to purchase ETH, thereby increasing the per-share ETH holdings and enhancing the balance sheet. However, if mNAV converges to 1 or falls below, the downward trend in ETH prices and weak secondary market support can shift the flywheel mechanism from 'enhancement' to 'dilution,' creating negative feedback.

data.title: The market capitalization of trillions of Meme coins on the Plasma chain has exceeded $14 million, with a daily increase of over 248%.
data.description: Market data shows that the market capitalization of TrillionS, a Meme coin on the Plasma chain, has surged past $14 million and is now trading at $13.6 million, a daily increase of over 248%. Odaily reminds users that Meme coin prices are subject to significant volatility, so investors should be aware of the risks.

data.description:
Blockchain analytics firm Elliptic has flagged a cache of leaked data from businesses controlled by sanctioned Moldovan oligarch and Kremlin ally Ilan Shor. The files, leaked earlier this month, provide a detailed look inside the A7 group, an operation based in Russia, operating a specialized “sanctions evasion-as-a-service. ” Elliptic’s analysis of the data shows that several […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/a7-leaks-russia-influence-elections-crypto/

data.title: SOS Limited Shifts Focus to Third-Party Mining Services
data.description: According to PANews, SOS Limited, a New York Stock Exchange-listed company involved in commodity trading and cryptocurrency mining, has temporarily halted its internal Bitcoin mining operations. In its latest 2025 semi-annual financial report, the company revealed this strategic shift following a $7.5 million fundraising effort through a share placement at the end of July. The funds are expected to prioritize the development and expansion of third-party mining hosting services.

data.title: Moody’s warns stablecoin boom in emerging markets threatens monetary stability
data.description:
27-9-2025 – Moody’s Ratings has issued a stark warning about the rapid rise of stablecoins in emerging markets, highlighting risks to monetary sovereignty and financial stability. The September 25 report notes that these digital assets, often pegged to the U. S. dollar, are increasingly used for remittances, mobile payments, and inflation hedging in regions like Latin [
source: https://www.cointrackdaily.com/moodys-warns-stablecoin-boom-in-emerging-markets-threatens-monetary-stability/

data.title: Investor Increases XPL Holdings Despite Losses
data.description: According to Foresight News, investor Huang Licheng has significantly increased his XPL holdings, raising his position to $13.3 million, equivalent to 8.8 million units. The average purchase price for these holdings is $1.55 per unit. Currently, the investment is experiencing a loss of $381,000 per unit, with an overall position loss of approximately $14.06 million.

data.title: PowerBank Launch Pool will be officially launched on October 1st
data.description: LLONG, a public blockchain for computing power asset protocols, has announced the upcoming launch of its PowerBank Launch Pool, where users can subscribe to a limited number of LLONG Prime Pioneer Medal NFTs. This NFT is deeply tied to validator nodes. According to the official website, validator nodes are the core infrastructure of the LLONG network, responsible for block production and security. Users who bind Prime will receive node dividends, priority verification rights, and priority access to airdrops and privileges in the future ecosystem.

data.title: Binance Alpha will list Bitlight Labs (LIGHT) with an airdrop threshold of 190 points.
data.description: According to official news, Bitlight Labs (LIGHT) has been listed on Binance Alpha. Trading on Alpha will begin at 7:00 PM (UTC+8) on September 27, 2025. After trading begins, users holding at least 190 Binance Alpha Points will be eligible to claim an airdrop of 150 LIGHT tokens. This airdrop is available on a first-come, first-served basis. The minimum score will automatically decrease by 15 points every hour while the promotion is ongoing. Please note that claiming the airdrop will cost 15 Binance Alpha Points. Users must confirm their claim within 24 hours on the Alpha promotion page; otherwise, they will forfeit the airdrop.

data.title: U.S. Commerce Secretary: Trump may forgive Musk but will not forget the negative impact
data.description: U.S. Commerce Secretary Howard Lutnick said Trump may forgive Musk, but will not forget the negative impact he had after he left the administration. Musk was once one of the president's closest allies in the Trump administration. Lutnick said: "I think that's the kind of person that Elon Musk is. He did win the president's friendship and admiration, but when he left, he showed a very negative side of himself. And I don't think the president will forget that negativity. Trump will be friendly with Elon Musk in the future and will be friendly and kind because he is very affable, but do I think he will forget it? I don't think so." (The Hill)

data.title: Syz Capital Partner Richard Byworth Withdraws from Bitcoin ETFs and MSTR to Metaplanet
data.description: According to BitcoinTreasuries, Richard Byworth, a partner at Swiss hedge fund Syz Capital, is withdrawing funds from Strategy (formerly MicroStrategy) and some Bitcoin ETF investments and starting to invest in Japanese Bitcoin treasury company Metaplanet. He expects the company's market performance to outperform Bitcoin's recent market trend by more than 50%.
